name: Falanx Group Limited
summary: Falanx Group Limited, through its subsidiaries, provides cyber defense and intelligence services to blue chip and government clients worldwide. It operates in two divisions, Falanx Cyber and Falanx Intelligence. The Falanx Cyber division provides cloud-based cyber monitoring and professional services, such as advisory; penetration testing; awareness and education; and managed detection and response services to government and commercial organizations. The Falanx Intelligence division offers political and security risk, and business intelligence services under the Falanx Assynt name. The company develops software for telecommunications, security, and data analytics; and offers management consultancy services, as well as provides risk assessment and investigation services. Falanx Group Limited was incorporated in 2012 and is headquartered in Reading, the United Kingdom.
